mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lab_task_execution_log ( log_id, task_code, task_name, status, started_at, finished_at, duration_ms, summary, error_message, result_snapshot_json ) VALUES ( #{logId}, #{taskCode}, #{taskName}, #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{durationMs}, #{summary}, #{errorMessage}, #{resultSnapshot, typeHandler=com.lab.booking.config.JsonMapTypeHandler} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE task_code = VALUES(task_code), task_name = VALUES(task_name), status = VALUES(status), started_at = VALUES(started_at), finished_at = VALUES(finished_at), duration_ms = VALUES(duration_ms), summary = VALUES(summary), error_message = VALUES(error_message), result_snapshot_json = VALUES(result_snapshot_json)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM lab_task_execution_log WHERE log_id = #{logId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM lab_task_execution_log ORDER BY log_id
